derived.causal_summary: Phase 002 built the mcp-figma skill v0.1.0 to drive Figma Desktop from the terminal via the silships figma-cli (npm figma-ds-cli): it maps the command surface under a read-only/mutating/destructive gating policy (eval, raw, run treated as arbitrary mutation), ships eight install and safety scripts (install, safe and yolo connect, daemon, doctor, unpatch, UTCP snippets, shared helpers), documents the optional Code Mode figma (Framelink) MCP exposing get_figma_data and download_figma_images, and is modeled on the sibling terminal-control skills. The skill was graph-registered with reciprocal sibling edges and live-verified: figma-ds-cli 1.2.0 installed from the repo build (npm publishes only a minimal 1.0.0) and the Code Mode figma manual discovered. The deliverable is .opencode/skills/mcp-figma/. This is a retroactive record of already-completed work.
